label.title: JCR Statistics
label.description: Compute the size of a JCR subtree and explore it as an interactive flamegraph. The same computation is available as the jcr-stats:compute-size Karaf command and the jcrStats GraphQL API.
label.error: An error occurred. Check server logs for details.
label.clickHint: Click a frame to zoom in; click a parent frame to zoom back out.
